mission.title: kubevirt: Add Kernel Boot feature to boot VMs
mission.description:
This is a draft PR.
**What this PR does / why we need it**:
This PR enables the VM to boot directly from a kernel and initrd stored in the host OS, allowing command line arguments to be passed directly to the installer.

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes** *(optional, in `fixes #<issue number>(, fixes #<issue_number>, ...)` format, will close the issue(s) when PR gets merged)*:
Fixes #2741 

**Special notes for your reviewer**:
This is a draft PR. 
Proposed design document can be found [here ](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RHIh8l906WIno-zhhpzgGhL-795uZUr_YM6_noLEtvw/edit#)

**Release note**:
```release-note
Allow users to boot a VM directly from kernel, initrd and command line arguments.
```

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
